description: Upgrade plan to migrate project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to Java 21 (latest LTS) and Spring Boot 3.4 ensures long-term support, improved performance, security patches, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x requires Spring Framework 6.x and Jakarta EE namespace migration.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Update all related dependencies for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.4 and Java 21.
tasks.taskSummary: Successfully upgraded PhotoAlbum-Java from Java 8 / Spring Boot 2.7.18 to Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.4.5. Updated pom.xml with new versions, migrated javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces in Photo.java, updated Dockerfile to eclipse-temurin-21. Build passes and all unit tests pass.
